failure_criteria: A different lead specialist is selected.
The route names a provider instead of a model class.
The fixture is modified during evaluation.

facts.known_constraint: No production merge or deploy without approval.

inputs.principal_instruction: Fixture BENCH-S033: reproduce and triage a user-reported defect from a BugReport envelope without taking an external action.

objective: Verify that support defect intake routes to the Bug Triage Analyst with complete capability coverage.
scenario: A verified reporter submits a reproducible defect and needs autonomous triage, fixture creation, diagnosis, and status communication.
